transcripts.name: blocked_validation_closeout
transcripts.normalized_human:
Validation closeout: BLOCKED

Remediation: do not close the bead with blocked proof evidence.

transcripts.name: rch_unavailable_command_budget
transcripts.command: franken-node ops operator-what-if --scenario rch-unavailable --command 'cargo test -p frankenengine-node' --json

Remediation: keep cargo-heavy commands behind rch exec.
